events.label: reasoning
events.text: 我们被要求评估"Motor circuits & disconnects"工作情况。场景描述：只有一张照片，关键标签、扭矩表或所需间隙尺寸不在画面内。参考材料：NEC Art. 430。任务：评估现场条件，返回适当决策。照片没有提供，我们只能基于描述判断。由于关键信息缺失（标签、扭矩表或间隙尺寸不在视野内），无法验证是否符合要求。所以决策应该是“needs_more_info”（需要更多信息）。风险可能是中等，因为不知道是否合规。工作阶段是“rough-complete”。组件条件没有提到有缺陷，所以空列表。百分比完成度估计？不知道，但说是粗完成，可以给一个估计如80%。价值(value)可能不需要，设为0。confidence应该反映我们不确定，比如0.5。其他字段按需填充。我们还应提供发现、行动、理由和参考。发现：关键标签和尺寸信息不可见。行动：拍摄额外照片或提供文档。理由：无法验证合规性。参考：NEC Art. 430。输出JSON。

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "needs_more_info",
  "risk": "medium",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": [],
  "percent_complete": 80,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.5,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Critical label, torque sheet, or clearance dimension needed for NEC Art. 430 verification is outside the single photo frame."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Take additional photographs showing the motor circuit disconnect label, torque markings, and required working clearances.",
    "Provide documentation (specs, torque values, panel schedules) to verify compliance."
  ],
  "rationale": "Insufficient visual evidence to assess compliance with NEC Art. 430 motor circuit and disconnect requirements. Missing information prevents a pass/fail determination.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Art. 430"
  ]
}
